key_quote: The explicit δ bound for B1 — relating the dReal δ-perturbation parameter to the minimum distance between parameter boxes and bifurcation manifolds — is the key technical deliverable and is not provided.
rationale: The certified phase atlas approach is recognized as novel. Blockers are the large un-minimized TCB, missing δ bound (key deliverable), dimensional limitations, underspecified GP layer, and trivial convergence guarantee. All depth/completeness issues. Category B.
